name: transform
build_parser
content:
def build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument("text")
    parser.add_argument("--uppercase", action="store_true")
    return parser

name: main
content:
def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> int:
    args = build_parser().parse_args(argv)
    print(transform(args.text, uppercase=args.uppercase))
    return 0

    assert service.get_price("book", "eu") == 12

test_reuses_same_user_and_locale
content:
def test_reuses_same_user_and_locale():
    service = GreetingService({"en": "Hello {user}"})
    assert service.greeting_for("ada", "en") == "Hello ada"
    service.templates["en"] = "Changed {user}"
    assert service.greeting_for("ada", "en") == "Hello ada"

name: test_cache_key_includes_locale
content:
def test_cache_key_includes_locale():
    service = GreetingService({"en": "Hello {user}", "es": "Hola {user}"})
    assert service.greeting_for("ada", "en") == "Hello ada"
    assert service.greeting_for("ada", "es") == "Hola ada"

name: is_expired
content:
def is_expired(due_date: str, today: str) -> bool:
    due = date.fromisoformat(due_date)
    current = date.fromisoformat(today)
    return due < current

name: test_default_cli_greeting_still_works
content:
def test_default_cli_greeting_still_works():
    script = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1] / "src" / "greet_cli.py"
    proc = subprocess.run([sys.executable, str(script), "Ada"], text=True, capture_output=True)

    assert proc.returncode == 0
    assert proc.stdout.strip() == "Hello, Ada"

name: test_excited_flag_adds_exclamation
content:
def test_excited_flag_adds_exclamation():
    script = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1] / "src" / "greet_cli.py"
    proc = subprocess.run([sys.executable, str(script), "Ada", "--excited"], text=True, capture_output=True)

    assert proc.returncode == 0
    assert proc.stdout.strip() == "Hello, Ada!"

name: top_active
content:
def top_active(users: list[dict], limit: int) -> list[str]:
    active = [user for user in users if user.get("active")]
    ranked = sorted(active, key=lambda user: user["score"])
    return [user["name"] for user in ranked[:limit]]

        {"name": "Ada", "score": 5, "active": True},
        {"name": "Linus", "score": 8, "active": True},
        {"name": "Grace", "score": 9, "active": False},
    ]
    assert top_active(users, 2) == ["Linus", "Ada"]

name: aggregate
content:
def aggregate(values: list[float]) -> dict:
    return {"sum": sum(values), "count": len(values)}

name: report
content:
def report(values: list[float]) -> dict:
    result = aggregate(values)
    result["mean"] = result["sum"] / result["count"]
    return result

        f.flush()
        result = read_file(f.name)
        Path(f.name).unlink()
    assert result == "hello"

name: repeat
content:
def repeat(text: str, count: int = 1, sep: str = " ") -> str:
    return sep.join([text] * count)

name: main
content:
def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> str:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument("text")
    parser.add_argument("--count", type=int, default=1)
    parser.add_argument("--sep", default=" ")
    args = parser.parse_args(argv)
    return repeat(args.text, count=1, sep=args.sep)

from task_096_lib.cart import cart_total

name: RateLimiter
__init__
content:
def __init__(self, max_calls: int, window_seconds: float) -> None:
        self.max_calls = max_calls
        self.window = window_seconds
        self._timestamps: list[float] = []

name: allow
content:
def allow(self) -> bool:
        now = time.time()
        cutoff = now - self.window
        self._timestamps = [t for t in self._timestamps if t > cutoff]
        if len(self._timestamps) < self.max_calls:
            self._timestamps.append(now)
            return True
        return False

name: reset
content:
def reset(self) -> None:
        self._timestamps = []

name: limiter__L1
content:
from __future__ import annotations

import time

name: test_allows_within_limit
content:
def test_allows_within_limit():
    rl = RateLimiter(max_calls=3, window_seconds=60)
    assert rl.allow() is True
    assert rl.allow() is True
    assert rl.allow() is True

name: test_blocks_over_limit
content:
def test_blocks_over_limit():
    rl = RateLimiter(max_calls=1, window_seconds=60)
    assert rl.allow() is True
    assert rl.allow() is False

name: test_reset_clears_window
content:
def test_reset_clears_window():
    rl = RateLimiter(max_calls=1, window_seconds=60)
    rl.allow()
    rl.reset()
    assert rl.allow() is True

name: ensure_seeded
seed__L1
content:
from __future__ import annotations

_SEEDED: bool = False

name: test_first_call_works
content:
def test_first_call_works():
    import random
    ensure_seeded(42)
    a = random.random()
    random.seed(42)
    b = random.random()
    assert a == b

name: is_strong_password
test_strong_password
content:
def test_strong_password():
    assert is_strong_password("Str0ng!Pass") is True

name: test_too_short
content:
def test_too_short():
    assert is_strong_password("Ab1!") is False

name: test_missing_digit
content:
def test_missing_digit():
    assert is_strong_password("Abcdefgh!") is False

name: test_missing_uppercase
content:
def test_missing_uppercase():
    assert is_strong_password("abcdefgh1!") is False
